в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ tab2/
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ tab3/
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ services/          # Angular services
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ guards/            # Route guards
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ models/            # TypeScript interfaces
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ components/        # Shared components
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ app.component.ts   # Root component
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ app.module.ts      # Root module
в”‚   в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ app-routing.module.ts

в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ theme/                # CSS theming

в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ index.html
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ android/                  # Android platform

в”њв”Ђв”Ђ capacitor.config.ts       # Capacitor configuration
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ ionic.config.json         # Ionic configuration
в””в”Ђв”Ђ package.json
